preview: JOINDER TO PIXELOOP LLC FOUNDERS EQUITY & CONTRIBUTION AGREEMENT This Joinder Agreement (this “Joinder”) is entered into as of ______________, 2026, by Ibrahim Yoonus Rasheed (“Founder C”) in favor of Pixeloop LLC (the “Company”), Ahmed Musannif Rasheed (“Founder A”), and Leon Parsaud (“Founder B”). RECITALS A. Founder A and Founder B have entered into that certain Founders Equity & Contribution Agreement, dated as of ______________, 2026, relating to the Company (the “Founders Agreement”).
